proposal_summary: This proposal requests 8,700 UNI (equivalent to $60,000) to onboard Forse by StableLab as a data service provider to analyze the effectiveness of the Uniswap Revitalization and Growth Program across 3 blockchains.

disclosed_entities.name: Forse / StableLab
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal seeks to onboard Forse by StableLab as a data service provider

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Accountability Committee
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The budget once the onchain vote passes will first go to the Uniswap Accountability Committee.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer budget to Uniswap Accountability Committee
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund the data analytics services provided by Forse by StableLab
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The proposal requests $60,000 worth of UNI, which is 8700 UNI... The budget once the onchain vote passes will first go to the Uniswap Accountability Committee.

claimed_complexity.reason: This is a straightforward budget request and service provider onboarding proposal with no smart contract upgrades or complex technical changes.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The proposal requests $60,000 worth of UNI, which is 8700 UNI to analyze the impact of the Uniswap Revitalization and Growth Program

limitations: No specific target addresses or executable code details are provided in the proposal text.
